mapper.select: /* SQL ID : OrgMenuDAO.selectAuthorizeByMenu 설 명 : 메뉴 코드 및 사용자 권한으로 메뉴의 권한 */ SELECT MENU_ID , MAX(VIEW_AUTH) AS VIEW_AUTH , MAX(REG_AUTHRTYN) AS REG_AUTHRTYN FROM TB_LMS_AUTHRT WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId} AND MENU_TYCD = IFNULL(#{menuType}, MENU_TYCD) AND MENU_ID = #{menuCd} AND #{authGrpCd} LIKE CONCAT('%',USER_AUTHRT_ID,'%') COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci GROUP BY MENU_ID
/* SQL ID : OrgMenuDAO.selectKey 설 명 : 메뉴 코드의 키 생성 */ SELECT 'MC'||LPAD(SQ_ORG_MENU.nextVal, 8, '0')
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : OrgMenuDAO.insertInit 설 명 : 기관 메뉴의 초기화 등록 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_MENU ( ORG_ID , MENU_ID , UP_MENU_ID , MENU_TYCD , MENUNM , MENU_LV , MENU_SEQ , MENU_URL , MENU_PATH , MENU_EXPLN , USEYN , LEFT_SIDE_MENU_IMG , MENU_TTL , OPTN_CTGR_CD_1 , OPTN_CD_1 , OPTN_CTGR_CD_2 , OPTN_CD_2 , OPTN_CTGR_CD_3 , OPTN_CD_3 , OPTN_CTGR_CD_4 , OPTN_CD_4 , OPTN_CTGR_CD_5 , OPTN_CD_5 , SSL_USEYN , BRDRLN_USEYN , BSCYN , MENU_INQYN , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM ) SELECT #{orgId} , MENU_ID , UP_MENU_ID , MENU_TYCD , MENUNM , MENU_LV , MENU_SEQ , MENU_URL , MENU_PATH , MENU_EXPLN , USEYN , LEFT_SIDE_MENU_IMG , MENU_TTL , OPTN_CTGR_CD_1 , OPTN_CD_1 , OPTN_CTGR_CD_2 , OPTN_CD_2 , OPTN_CTGR_CD_3 , OPTN_CD_3 , OPTN_CTGR_CD_4 , OPTN_CD_4 , OPTN_CTGR_CD_5 , OPTN_CD_5 , SSL_USEYN , BRDRLN_USEYN , 'Y' , 'Y' , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() , #{mdfrId} , FN_DTTM() FROM TB_LMS_MENU WHERE MENU_TYCD = #{menuType}
